message:
feat(web): add 3D structure caching and WASM GC skew

Structure caching (gwjx.2, gwjx.3):
- Add IndexedDB cache for 3D structures with LRU eviction (100MB limit)
- Integrate cache with structure-loader (check before RCSB fetch)
- Add fromCache tracking in useStructureQuery hook
- Show "Cached" badge in Model3DView when loaded from IndexedDB
- Add "Search RCSB PDB" link for missing structures

Phage catalog (gwjx.1):
- Add PDB IDs for P1 phage (9AY3, 9AY5) and P2 phage (3AQJ)
- Document Felix O1 has no direct structures in PDB

WASM GC skew (yvs8.1):
- Add calculateGCSkewWasm with WASM acceleration and JS fallback
- Update runAnalysisImpl to use async WASM version
- Remove unused sync wrapper

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
